news.title: A Bitcoin whale just woke up after 7 years. 2,931 $Bitcoin (BTC.CC)$ (~$188M) was moved after sitting untouched since BTC traded at ~$6.5K. Today, with BTC above ~$64K, the same stack is worth nearly 10x more. Data credit: @arkham - Moomoo
